title: The Truth of Woman by Sir Walter Scott
content:
Woman's faith, and woman's trust -
Write the characters in the dust;
Stamp them on the running stream,
Print them on the moon's pale beam,
And each ev

title: Harp of the North, Farewell! by Sir Walter Scott
content:
Harp of the North, farewell! The hills grow dark,
On purple peaks a deeper shade descending;
In twilight copse the glow-worm lights her spark,
The dee

title: Border Ballad by Sir Walter Scott
content:
March, march, Ettrick and Teviotdale,
Why the deil dinna ye march forward in order!
March, march, Eskdale and Liddesdale,

title: Patriotism 02 Nelson, Pitt, Fox by Sir Walter Scott
content:
TO mute and to material things
New life revolving summer brings;
The genial call dead Nature hears,
And in her glory reappears.
But oh, my Country's w

title: Patriotism 1. Innominatus by Sir Walter Scott
content:
BREATHES there the man with soul so dead,
Who never to himself hath said,
   'This is my own, my native land!'
Whose heart hath ne'er within him burn'
